titleStmt.title: SII 31.16: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 16. (A.R. No. B 309 of 1937.) GŪḌAVALLI, REPALLE TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a Nandi pillar standing by the road-side near the house of Nāgayya.
This record is dated in the Śaka year 1050, Uttarāyaṇa samkrānti corresponding to December 24, Monday, 1128 A.D.

It refers to the earlier (anādi samsiddham) gift of land to the god Nāgēśvara Śrī Mahādēva situated at Kuṁumdavalli and land measuring kha to the god Pṛithīvīśvaradēva, kha 2 to the god Mallikārjunadēva and kha 1, na to the god Gaṇapēśvaradēva. kha 3 to Pūdāri Prōlamarāju (village deity) and also to sāni-māni-nibandhakāḷu. It further states that the Ekkaṭis also made the gift of land measuring (8) kha and 10 na to the god Vināyaka at Ayirāvaram for the merit of Gaṇapatidēva in the Cyclic year Nandana.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīramaṇīṁsa
kaladinmumu
khapūritasita
kīrttidhanyuṁbu
ṇyodaya vistā
ru variyaṁcu
ṁbāyakakōri
kulōttuṁga cō
ṟagoṁkamahī
śunun . śakavaru
paṁbulu 1050
yagunēṁṭi Utta
rāyaṇa saṁ
krāṁtti nimitta
muna kumuṁda
davalli nāgēśva
raśrīmahādē
varaku Anā
di saṁsiddhamai
navrittikṣētramu
*) The sun, a Linga and a crescent are carved on the top.

kha 8 pritivīśya
radēvaraku kha 2
varaku kha 2
mallikārjuna dē
varaku kha 1 na 10
gaṇapēśvaradē
varaku kha 1 pū
dāriprōlama
rājunaku vritti
kha 3 sānimāni
niṁ baṁdhulakuikkaḍa anusvāraṁ anavasaramu
Ekkaṭīlu tammu
Ērina gaṇapati
dēvamahārāju
naku dharmmuvu
gānu naṁdana saṁva
tyarānaṁ beṭṭina kṣē
tramu kha Û vinā
yakuniki Ayirā
varamuna na 10 . sva
dattādviguṇaṁ pu
ṇyaparadattānu

pālanaṁ pa
radattā pahā
rēṇa svadattaṁ ni
pphēlaṁ bhavē[ttu .]
pallama
maraku na 5
siṁggana bō
yuniki seyi
divyakuṁpa
sulu 25 vri
tti cēnu kha 1
I(Ī)dīpānaku
Eṁṭanu padisi
nnālu naḍapu vāṁḍa
vāṁḍu . goṟa
vāniki vri
tti na 10 kāse
mārōjune
ku vrittina 5

kārttika
dīpānaku vritti
naga
vrittikha 2
nū
nikivrittikha 2
pa bōvva(ppa)pā
nikivrittikha 2
ra ṟa māca
sānikivritti
kha 1 bōṟa ba
ṟti kāmasāniki
vrittikha 1 na
mana kūṁttuṟu
gavurasāniki
vritti 1 cōṟa
peggaḍakūṁtu
ṟa mārasā
niki vritti kha 1 na
2 talupukaṭṭina ma
llōjinaku vritti 5
saṁkuvallaku
vritti na 15 The Inscription stops
Digital edition of SII 31.16 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
